Temasek is currently reviewing the RFI submission responses and we will be reaching out to Zycus for the submission clarifications in early July 2026
6th Jun- RFI submitted on time- strong proposal and now we wait for shortlist
require QIT and reference request for Workday, more clarifications
for clarification, this RFI is only for Temasek itself. It does not include Temasek Portfolio Companies
Competitors Gep, Coupa, iValua, Wday, Jagger
NDA entered into between Temasek and Zycus on 20 April 2026
Process: RFI/RFP Sep, Oct/ final decision Dec
StageName: Qualified -> Formal Evaluation; ForecastCategoryName: Pipeline -> Best Case (both by Carl Kimball same day owner changed)
9 contact roles, none Champion; highest is VP/Director Procurement (Shirley Tan, Wing Yu Onz) — no EB/CFO/CIO engaged, no advocacy

top_rationale: Live 5-vendor RFI in Formal Evaluation, on-track: RFI submitted 6 Jun, buyer confirmed review 15 Jun and delivered a 60-question clarification set on 1 Jul (due 15 Jul) — buyer is actively evaluating our submission, shortlist pending.

Buyer engagement is real but procedural/committee-driven; highest contact is VP Procurement (Shirley Tan) / Director Procurement (Wing Yu Onz, Decision Maker) — no Economic Buyer and no champion across 9 contact roles.
Workday is both a required integration and a named competitor (incumbent-advantage risk); full field is GEP, Coupa, Ivalua, Workday, Jaggaer.

Amount churned 200k->400k->600k->310k->325k as scope was corrected to Holding-only; forecast rep-upgraded Pipeline->Best Case on 11 May (not buyer-voiced); stage advanced same day owner changed to Carl Kimball.
No Avoma calls / zero meeting evidence — engagement is entirely the RFI email trail + Next Step notes; AI-embedded I2O differentiation is rep-claimed, not buyer-validated.
24-month-old deal (created Jul 2024), ~2 months in Formal Evaluation; buyer's own timeline targets a Dec decision, aligned to the 18 Dec close.

drivers: ✅ Live, on-track Formal-Evaluation RFI: NDA signed, RFI submitted, and buyer actively evaluating Zycus's submission (60-question clarification 1 Jul) — a genuine live participant, not dark.

⚠️ No champion mapped across 9 contact roles — all engagement is evaluative, zero advocacy in a 5-vendor race. ► Convert the most-engaged evaluator (Adam Kang or Wing Yu Onz) into a coach: feed competitive intel + co-build the ROI case before shortlist.

⚠️ No Economic Buyer engaged — highest reach is VP/Director Procurement on a $325k sovereign-wealth deal. ► Use the STE exec-sponsor route to get the value case in front of the budget owner before the Dec decision.

⚠️ Crowded field with Workday incumbent-integration advantage (buyer requires Workday integration + a Workday reference). ► Neutralize with a Workday-integrated Zycus reference and buyer-validated I2O/AI differentiation, not a rep claim.

⚠️ No buyer-voiced preference and no quantified business case — 'well positioned on AI-embedded I2O' is a rep note. ► Mine the 60-question set for quantified pain and get a buyer to confirm a differentiator in the clarification exchange.
⚠️ Best Case forecast is aggressive for a not-yet-shortlisted, champion-less deal. ► Keep Best Case only if the shortlist confirms us; otherwise correct toward Pipeline in Salesforce.
win.focus_now: Turn one engaged evaluator into a champion and land buyer-validated differentiation vs Workday before the shortlist — that's what moves us from one-of-five to front-runner.
win.ceiling_applied: RFP-round stage ceiling ≤60 (Formal Evaluation); score 39 sits below it — not binding. Best Case forecast keeps the ≤80 conviction cap off.

drivers: ✅ Process-mode ON, on-track: live structured RFI with a dated future milestone (clarification response due 15 Jul) and deliverables landing on cadence — stalling drag suspended.
✅ Fresh two-way buyer engagement ≤14d: Temasek returned a 60-question clarification set on 1 Jul, after confirming review on 15 Jun — buyer investing in evaluating our submission.
✅ RFI submitted on time 6 Jun; dense forward Next Step trail (Feb→Jul) and a fresh, advancing Next Step (updated 1 Jul) carrying the 15 Jul milestone.
✅ CRM trend forward: stage advanced to Formal Evaluation and forecast upgraded to Best Case (11 May); close date stable at 18 Dec (no slip).

⚠️ Engagement is procedural/email-only — no substantive buyer meeting since the 6 Feb AI review and no accepted future session on the calendar. ► Convert the 15 Jul clarification response into a live working session to add a real two-way meeting and read buyer reception.
⚠️ Shortlist still pending 33+ days post-submission; a 60-question clarification can signal gaps. ► Use the response to close Workday-integration/competitive gaps and pin down the shortlist timeline.
mom.focus_now: Deliver a standout 15 Jul clarification response and lock the next live buyer touchpoint (working session + a shortlist date) so motion doesn't stall after submission.

best_practices.item: Develop a champion — convert the most-favorable evaluator (Adam Kang or Wing Yu Onz) into a coach who advocates on the shortlist
best_practices.rank_reason: Champion-less committee deal in a 5-vendor RFI is the top loss risk; highest-precedence next move.

best_practices.item: Neutralize Workday incumbent advantage + get buyer-validated AI/I2O differentiation (Workday-integrated reference)
best_practices.rank_reason: Primary competitive threat (incumbent ERP integration) is unaddressed and differentiation is only rep-claimed.

best_practices.item: Map and reach the Economic Buyer via the STE exec route
best_practices.rank_reason: No budget authority engaged on a $325k sovereign-wealth deal; EB absence caps win-likelihood.

best_practices.item: Co-build a quantified ROI / business case (commercial workstream) with Wing Yu Onz / Shirley Tan
best_practices.rank_reason: No metrics captured; price-competitive GEP/Ivalua exploit an unquantified value case.

sum.headline: No change in the last 24h.
sum.as_of_note: As of 1 Jul (8 days ago): Temasek returned a 60-question RFI clarification set, due 15 Jul; Zycus awaiting shortlist. No executed change since — outside the 48h window.
